_note: Offline DCL numeric-magic mechanism profile. Canonical formula 0x08 abilities route to deterministic magic damage and formula 0x0C to healing. It composes MA plus a non-stacking Rod offensive or Staff support implement modifier, ability/bolt tier, two centered bounded Faith terms, elemental affinity, Shell, Zodiac, a reserve stack cap, and Gm. Absorb reroutes a native HP debit to credit; null produces zero; Undead reroutes a native HP credit to damage. Native result-kind gates prevent cancelled or non-HP results from being resurrected. Native MaxMP is the per-battle budget and a job-free MA-scaled own-turn trickle is a mechanism fixture. All magnitudes are mechanism fixtures. The unit +0x52..+0x56 affinity block remains a live gate.
DclDamageFormula: if(dcl.isMagicDamage, if(dcl.nativeHpDamageResult, if(dcl.magicAbsorbed || dcl.targetNull, 0, dcl.magicAmount), 0), if(dcl.isMagicHeal && t.status.undead, if(dcl.nativeHpCreditResult, dcl.magicAmount, 0), if(dcl.nativeHpDamageResult, dcl.oldDebit, 0)))
DclHealingFormula: if(dcl.isMagicDamage && dcl.magicAbsorbed, if(dcl.nativeHpDamageResult, dcl.magicAmount, 0), if(dcl.isMagicHeal, if(dcl.nativeHpCreditResult, if(t.status.undead, 0, dcl.magicAmount), 0), if(dcl.nativeHpCreditResult, dcl.oldCredit, 0)))
DclPreviewDamageFormula: if(dcl.isMagicDamage, if(dcl.magicAbsorbed || dcl.targetNull, 0, dcl.magicAmount), if(dcl.isMagicHeal && t.status.undead, dcl.magicAmount, 0))
DclPreviewHealingFormula: if(dcl.isMagicDamage && dcl.magicAbsorbed, dcl.magicAmount, if(dcl.isMagicHeal, if(t.status.undead, 0, dcl.magicAmount), 0))

DclDerivedVariables.Name: dcl.isElemental
DclDerivedVariables.Formula: dcl.isMagicDamage && !dcl.isSpiritual && (dcl.elementFire || dcl.elementIce || dcl.elementLightning || dcl.elementWind || dcl.elementEarth || dcl.elementWater)

DclDerivedVariables.Name: dcl.targetAbsorb
DclDerivedVariables.Formula: dcl.isElemental && ((dcl.elementFire && t.element.absorb.fire) || (dcl.elementIce && t.element.absorb.ice) || (dcl.elementLightning && t.element.absorb.lightning) || (dcl.elementWind && t.element.absorb.wind) || (dcl.elementEarth && t.element.absorb.earth) || (dcl.elementWater && t.element.absorb.water))

DclDerivedVariables.Name: dcl.targetNull
DclDerivedVariables.Formula: dcl.isElemental && ((dcl.elementFire && t.element.null.fire) || (dcl.elementIce && t.element.null.ice) || (dcl.elementLightning && t.element.null.lightning) || (dcl.elementWind && t.element.null.wind) || (dcl.elementEarth && t.element.null.earth) || (dcl.elementWater && t.element.null.water))

DclDerivedVariables.Name: dcl.targetHalve
DclDerivedVariables.Formula: dcl.isElemental && ((dcl.elementFire && t.element.halve.fire) || (dcl.elementIce && t.element.halve.ice) || (dcl.elementLightning && t.element.halve.lightning) || (dcl.elementWind && t.element.halve.wind) || (dcl.elementEarth && t.element.halve.earth) || (dcl.elementWater && t.element.halve.water))

DclDerivedVariables.Name: dcl.targetWeak
DclDerivedVariables.Formula: dcl.isElemental && ((dcl.elementFire && (t.element.weak.fire || t.status.oil)) || (dcl.elementIce && t.element.weak.ice) || (dcl.elementLightning && t.element.weak.lightning) || (dcl.elementWind && t.element.weak.wind) || (dcl.elementEarth && t.element.weak.earth) || (dcl.elementWater && t.element.weak.water))

DclDerivedVariables.Name: dcl.targetStrong
DclDerivedVariables.Formula: dcl.isElemental && ((dcl.elementFire && t.element.strengthen.fire) || (dcl.elementIce && t.element.strengthen.ice) || (dcl.elementLightning && t.element.strengthen.lightning) || (dcl.elementWind && t.element.strengthen.wind) || (dcl.elementEarth && t.element.strengthen.earth) || (dcl.elementWater && t.element.strengthen.water))

DclDerivedVariables.Name: dcl.elementPermille
DclDerivedVariables.Formula: if(dcl.targetNull, 0, if(dcl.targetHalve, const.dclAffinityHalvePermille, if(dcl.targetWeak, const.dclAffinityWeakPermille, if(dcl.targetStrong, const.dclAffinityStrongPermille, 1000))))

DclDerivedVariables.Name: dcl.magicMa
DclDerivedVariables.Formula: if(dcl.isMagicBolt, a.rawMa + dcl.magicBoltMod, if(dcl.isMagicHeal, a.rawMa + dcl.supportMagicMod, if(dcl.isMagicDamage, a.rawMa + dcl.offensiveMagicMod, a.rawMa)))
